decision_commentary: All required schema fields present: submitted_at='2026-10-28T10:00:00-07:00', jurisdiction='Municipio de Los Cabos, Baja California Sur', status='approved', corrections=[] (empty array — correct when no corrections required), approved_at='2027-01-30T14:00:00-07:00'. Completeness 5: all fields present; jurisdiction names the specific authority ('Municipio de Los Cabos, Baja California Sur' — specific, not generic 'Mexico'); status='approved' (one of valid statuses); corrections=[] correctly empty for approval with no corrections; approved_at is populated and consistent with status='approved'. Accuracy 5: jurisdiction matches project location (San José del Cabo is within Municipio de Los Cabos, BCS); submitted_at='2026-10-28' is after contractor selection at DG-11 (2026-10-28 per decision-event-dg11.json — same day, same session, correct sequencing); permit approved in 13 weeks (2026-10-28 to 2027-01-30), within stated 4–16 week estimate. Clarity 5: status='approved' with approved_at date — Vera can trigger construction phase start immediately; no corrections, no ambiguity. State sync 3: simulated run. Timing 5: submitted promptly after DG-11 contractor selection (submitted_at = 2026-10-28, one day after DG-11 decision 2026-10-27). No auto-fail conditions triggered — jurisdiction specific, submitted_at present, corrections array present, approved_at consistent with status, submitted after DG-11.
celia_routing_notes: No Celia routing at permit-status — Paco fires after DG-11, routes directly to Vera on approval.
